sections.paragraph:
Piel (denom. from שָׁלשׁ)-

(1) to divide into three parts, Deu 19:3.

(2) to do any thing the third time, 1Ki 18:34.

(3) to do on the third day. 1Sa 20:19, וְשִׁלַּשְׁתָּ תֵּרֵד “and on the third day come down.”

Pual, part. מְשֻׁלָּשׁ-

(1) threefold, Ecc 4:12 Eze 42:6.

(2) of the third year, Gen 15:9.
